transcript: I'm gonna need, uh... probably like, five, ten gallons of gas. But I can't pay... until, uh, the tenth.
I'm just here caddy-corner to you.
Well, I don't extend any credit as far as that goes, so...
Well, you can make an exception.
Didn't wanna tell you this, but I actually went ahead and took... the gas already.
[unclear] ...rather than here, because nobody got any gas from me.
No, and you... you didn't know about it.
[clears throat] Oh yeah, I know about it.
I'll be there in ten minutes, partner.
And you ain't gettin' a dime from me.
Yeah, I'ma whip ya ass, buddy.
I'll do it here in fifteen minutes.
'Cause I'm tired of your horse shit over there.
Just hurry up and get down here.
Uh, maybe I'll take my time. What are you gonna do about it?
Uh, no, you just rush on down here.
I don't give a shit who you are, man. Don't waste my time on the phone!
Well, you're the one that called me, so...
You son of a bitch. You called me!
Listen, Charlie. Quit callin' me, because... [scoffs] I don't gotta lot of time today for your song and dance.
Well, why don't you just hang your goddamned phone up, and quit playin' on the telephone?
Okay, I'm going to hang up now.
You know where the Brighton Depot is?
Why don't you meet me there about six thirty?
And I'll put a peg leg up ya ass.
Oh, will ya? Well, I'll be damned.
Tommy Vee, huh? That means a lot to me.
And I'm gonna pay my bill, 'cept I'm gonna pay it with my frickin' fists!
Well, what you could always do is stick one up your ass.
And I'm gonna whip ya ass.
Alrighty. That sounds good enough to me.
What the hell kind of place is this here?
